summary: Likely a 4-3-3 (have flirted with a 3-4-2-1) built on getting the 10s 1v1 and overlapping fullbacks — but open to counters and needing a better press.
style: 4-3-3 / 3-4-2-1 — play to get the wingers (10s) 1v1, overlapping FBs & WBs, crosses into the box, central block structure.

keyPlayers.name: Martin Baturina
keyPlayers.note: Goals, assists & creativity — lovely dribbler in tight areas and a great long passer

tactics: Get the 10s 1v1, overlap the fullbacks and cross, behind a central block. Upcoming friendlies will help settle the formation; the press and counter exposure need work.
sources: John Walker (@johnwalker_1986) — pre-tournament tactical scouting, May–Jun 2026
